title: [FIRRTL][ExportVerilog] Generated Verilog File is abnormally large.
body:
Using CIRCT: 1.22.1
OS: Centos 7.9
Generated Verilog file is extremely large in some unkown cases. Here is how to repete:

```
git clone https://github.com/OpenXiangShan/XiangShan.git
cd XiangShan
git checkout nanhu-v2
make init
mill -i XiangShan.runMain top.TopMain -td build --config DefaultConfig --full-stacktrace -X none -E chirrtl -o XSTop.chirrtl.fir --num-cores 2 --fpga-platform --disable-all --remove-assert
firtool --disable-all-randomization --verilog --disable-annotation-unknown --dedup --format=fir --annotation-file=build/XSTop.anno.json -o build/XSTop.v build/XSTop.chirrtl.fir
```
The generated XSTop.v is 3.9GiB，which is 150MiB when using default firrtl compiler.

The module Ftq may be where the problem is. The size of it's verilog file is 3.8GiB, which is around 9MiB when using default firrtl compiler.
